## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change small and focused.
- [ ] I did not include secrets, private data, corporate data, customer data, or real PII.
- [ ] I used synthetic data when examples or datasets were needed.
- [ ] I updated documentation if needed.
- [ ] I tested or reviewed the change.
